rightsAnalysis.haqReasoning: BISP rules ke mutabiq aap ko rejection ke khilaf appeal ka poora haq hai. Aap ki documents mukammal hain.

complaintDraft.urduDraft:
Bakhidmat Tehsil Office, BISP.

Janab,

Meri BISP kafaalat ki darkhwast bila wajah radd kar di gayi hai. Mere pas tamam zaroori kaghazat mojood hain. Baraye meherbani meri darkhwast par dobara nazar-e-sani ki jaye.

Shukriya.
complaintDraft.englishDraft:
To the BISP Tehsil Office.

Subject: Appeal against Application Rejection.

My BISP application was rejected without clear grounds. I possess all necessary eligibility documents. I request an appeal and re-evaluation as per BISP 2023 guidelines.

Regards.
complaintDraft.subject: BISP Rejection Appeal
